headlines.title: How Modern Veterinary Technology Inspires Future Animal Doctors
headlines.lede: Animals cannot point to a sore joint or explain that something feels “off.” That is why tomorrow’s veterinarians need more than a love of animals. They need sharper tools, steady judgment, and early chances to think like clinicians.
